retrieved_note: Pilot extraction updated with official MCB public sources including the Jan-Jun 2026 SOBC, the Signature FAQ PDF, the credit-card summary box, and the fee-information PDF.

notes: Official Jan-Jun 2026 SOBC lists MCB Visa Platinum Debit Card issuance, renewal/annual, and replacement at PKR 14,000 each.
No public salary, balance, or standing annual-fee waiver threshold was found for the generic Platinum debit tier.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: No fee if the customer maintains a quarterly average current-account balance of PKR 2,000,000 or total deposits of PKR 5,000,000; otherwise PKR 10,000 is charged per quarter.

notes: Official MCB FAQ PDF confirms deposit-based eligibility rather than salary-based eligibility.

Eligibility is published as PKR 2,000,000 in a current account at application time or PKR 5,000,000 equivalent total deposits, with the same thresholds monitored on a quarterly-average basis thereafter.
The current official SOBC publishes a quarterly fee model rather than a flat annual fee.
No salary or balance threshold.

Official Jan-Jun 2026 SOBC publishes separate PayPak Classic and PayPak Gold fee lines, so the generic PayPak record keeps annual_fee_pkr null rather than collapsing two official variants into one scalar.
Official Jan-Jun 2026 SOBC lists MCB Debit Mastercard Classic issuance, renewal/annual, supplementary, and replacement at PKR 3,000 each.
No salary or balance threshold.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: MCB Nayab Current Account affluent tier publishes free issuance, annual, and renewal on the Exclusive Nayab Card; mass/premium current tiers and the Nayab Savings Account publish a 50% issuance discount only.

notes: Official Nayab account tables in the Jan-Jun 2026 SOBC say Nayab Visa card charges, where applicable, follow the Visa Gold Plus price shown on the debit-card fee table.
The current Visa Gold Plus issuance, renewal/annual, and replacement price in the official SOBC is PKR 4,000.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: 100% annual-fee waiver if the basic card spends PKR 50,000 within 60 days of the fee charge date.

notes: Official Jan-Jun 2026 MCB credit-card SOBC lists the Classic basic-card issuance/annual fee at PKR 7,000 per annum.
No public income or balance threshold found on current official card pages or summary-box material.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: 100% annual-fee waiver if the basic card spends PKR 150,000 within 60 days of the fee charge date.

notes: Official Jan-Jun 2026 MCB credit-card SOBC lists the Gold basic-card issuance/annual fee at PKR 14,000 per annum.
No public income or balance threshold found on current official card pages or summary-box material.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: 100% annual-fee waiver if the basic card spends PKR 250,000 within 60 days of the fee charge date.

notes: Official Jan-Jun 2026 MCB credit-card SOBC lists the Platinum basic-card issuance/annual fee at PKR 22,000 per annum.
No public income or balance threshold found on current official card pages or summary-box material.
Official Jan-Jun 2026 SOBC lists Visa Gold Debit Card issuance, renewal/annual, and replacement at PKR 4,000 each.
No public salary, balance, or standing annual-fee waiver threshold found.
Official Jan-Jun 2026 SOBC lists Visa Silver Debit Card issuance, renewal/annual, supplementary, and replacement at PKR 3,000 each.
No public salary, balance, or standing annual-fee waiver threshold found.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Issuance fee is waived if the Fun Club current account maintains PKR 50,000 average balance in the month of issuance; the annual fee is waived if PKR 50,000 average balance is maintained in the month before the annual fee falls due.

notes: Official Jan-Jun 2026 SOBC lists the Fun Club debit card issuance/annual fee and replacement fee at PKR 1,000 each.
Youth/fun card; no publicly disclosed salary threshold.

gaps: Generic PayPak Debit Card still collapses two current official fee variants (PayPak Classic and PayPak Gold), so annual_fee_pkr remains intentionally null on the generic record.
No current official MCB-controlled public source surfaced income thresholds for the credit-card tiers in this pass.
MCB Visa Signature Debit Card currently publishes a quarterly non-maintenance fee model rather than a flat annual fee.
